info.name: Nebula Unified API
info.description:
Unified Nebula API collection for OpenAI-compatible, provider-native, image, video, embedding, rerank, and realtime endpoints.

Generated from: https://llm.ai-nebula.com/v1/models
Base URL: https://llm.ai-nebula.com

Set `api_key` in the imported Postman environment before running requests.
Provider model folders are generated from `/v1/models` and grouped by `owned_by` plus inferred capability.

item.name: 00 - Getting Started
item.description: Start here. Confirm authentication, list models, then run a tiny chat request.

request.description: Returns models available to the current API key. Response shape defaults to OpenAI format.
Small OpenAI-compatible request. Use this to confirm key, base URL, and model availability.

item.name: 01 - Text / OpenAI-compatible
item.description: Use these endpoints with OpenAI-compatible clients and cURL wrappers.

request.description: Universal text chat endpoint for OpenAI-compatible model calls.
Set `stream: true`. In cURL use `-N` to avoid buffering SSE chunks.
OpenAI Responses-compatible endpoint. Best for GPT/o-series reasoning, tools, and multimodal input.
Responses API with built-in web search preview tool.

item.name: 02 - Native Provider APIs
item.description: Provider-native request shapes for Claude and Gemini. Use when official native SDK compatibility matters.

item.name: Anthropic / Claude Native
item.description: Native Anthropic message and count-token APIs.

request.description: Estimate Claude input tokens before sending a message request.

item.name: Google / Gemini Native
item.description: Native Gemini request paths and body shape.

request.description: Native Gemini image generation shape. Response can include inlineData base64 image parts.
Gemini native embedding endpoint. Model is in URL path, not body.
Rerank documents by relevance to a query.

body.raw:
{
  "model": "{{default_rerank_model}}",
  "query": "What is artificial intelligence?",
  "documents": [
    "AI is a branch of computer science dedicated to creating intelligent systems.",
    "Machine learning is a subfield of AI focused on learning from data.",
    "Deep learning uses neural networks for pattern recognition."
  ],
  "top_n": 3,
  "return_documents": true
}

item.name: 04 - Image Generation
item.description: Unified image generation endpoint with provider-specific request bodies.

item.name: Gemini / Nano Banana - Text to Image

request.description: Gemini image generation. Gemini returns b64_json regardless of response_format.

body.raw:
{
  "model": "gemini-2.5-flash-image",
  "prompt": "A cute orange kitten sitting in a garden, sunny day, high quality photography.",
  "size": "16:9",
  "quality": "high",
  "n": 1,
  "temperature": 1.1,
  "top_p": 0.95,
  "response_format": "b64_json",
  "image_size": "2K",
  "mime_type": "image/png",
  "response_modalities": "image"
}

request.description: Doubao Seededit image-to-image edit. Replace `image_base64` with real data URL.

body.raw:
{
  "model": "gpt-image-1",
  "prompt": "A cute orange kitten sitting in a garden, sunny day, high quality photography.",
  "size": "1024x1024",
  "quality": "high",
  "n": 1
}

request.description: Qwen text-to-image with provider-native `input` and `parameters` body.
Qwen image edit with provider-native body.

item.name: 05 - Video Generation
item.description: Video generation is async: submit task, poll status, then use returned URL or download endpoint for Sora 2.

body.raw:
{
  "model": "veo-3.1-fast-generate-preview",
  "prompt": "Aerial view of a sci-fi city at dawn, sunlight piercing through clouds.",
  "durationSeconds": 6,
  "aspectRatio": "16:9",
  "resolution": "1080p",
  "fps": 24,
  "generateAudio": false
}

{
  "model": "wan2.5-t2v-preview",
  "prompt": "A kitten slowly opens its eyes, ears gently twitch, camera slowly pushes in.",
  "duration": 5,
  "size": "1280*720",
  "smart_rewrite": true,
  "generate_audio": true
}

request.description: Doubao Seedance text-to-video. Parameters live inside metadata.content text markers.
Poll every 3-5 seconds until status is `succeeded` or `failed`.
Only needed for Sora 2. Veo/Wanxiang/Seedance return URL directly in query response.

item.name: 06 - Realtime & Voice
item.description: Postman imports these as reference HTTP-like items. For real use, create a Postman WebSocket request with the shown URL and Authorization header.

request.description:
WebSocket endpoint for GPT Realtime models.
Use Postman WebSocket mode, not normal HTTP send.
Header: Authorization: Bearer {{api_key}}
First message should be a `session.update` event.

WebSocket endpoint for Gemini Live native format.
Use Postman WebSocket mode, not normal HTTP send.
Header: Authorization: Bearer {{api_key}}
First message should be a `setup` object.

item.name: 90 - Models by Provider
item.description: Auto-generated from `/v1/models`. Each model gets a low-risk sample request using the most likely endpoint for its capability.

request.description:
Model: `gpt-5.1`
Provider: Codex
Capabilities: text
Context: 400K

Model: `gpt-5.1-codex`
Provider: Codex
Capabilities: text
Context: 400K

Model: `gpt-5.1-codex-mini`
Provider: Codex
Capabilities: text
Context: 128K

Model: `gpt-5.2`
Provider: Codex
Capabilities: text
Context: 400K
Notes: Recommended flagship chat/reasoning/coding model.

Model: `gpt-5.1-chat`
Provider: Custom
Capabilities: text
Context: 128K

Model: `qwen3-coder-plus`
Provider: Custom
Capabilities: text
Context: 1M

Model: `qwen3-omni-flash`
Provider: Custom
Capabilities: text, audio
Notes: Supports thinking and ASR-related parameters in docs.

body.raw:
{
  "model": "gemini-2.0-flash-preview-image-generation",
  "prompt": "A cute orange kitten sitting in a garden, sunny day, high quality photography.",
  "size": "16:9",
  "quality": "high",
  "n": 1,
  "temperature": 1.1,
  "top_p": 0.95,
  "response_format": "b64_json",
  "image_size": "2K",
  "mime_type": "image/png",
  "response_modalities": "image"
}

Capabilities: text
Notes: Reasoning model. Prefer /v1/responses for full reasoning controls.
